title: sterculia subpeltata
intro:
Sterculia subpeltata is a species of flowering plant in the family Sterculiaceae, native to tropical Africa and Asia, commonly known as the African or Asian sterculia.

This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Sterculia subpeltata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
